models.name: Heath-Jarrow-Morton Framework
models.short_description: A general no-arbitrage framework that models the evolution of the entire forward rate curve simultaneously.
models.key_insight: The drift is fully determined by the volatility function under no-arbitrage.

models.name: LIBOR Market Model (BGM)
models.short_description: Models discrete forward LIBOR rates directly under their forward measure, producing market-consistent cap/swaption prices.
models.key_insight: By modeling observable market rates, calibration to cap/floor vols is direct.
